for: the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer
to: comply with any request under subsection (2)
ask an officer of the Service or a Welsh family proceedings officer to monitor, or arrange for the monitoring of, the individual's compliance with the direction (or the condition)

conditions.text: in any family proceedings the court makes an activity direction in relation to an individual, or makes a child arrangements order that imposes, or varies a child arrangements order so as to impose, an activity condition on an individual

to: ask an officer of the Service or a Welsh family proceedings officer to report to the court on any failure by the individual to comply with the direction (or the condition)

conditions.text: in any family proceedings the court makes an activity direction in relation to an individual, or makes a child arrangements order that imposes, or varies a child arrangements order so as to impose, an activity condition on an individual
